rule_metadata.name: esentutl
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'esentutl' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule esentutl
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'esentutl' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "esentutl"
		rule_category = "greyware_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = /Esentutl.{0,1000}\/p\s\/o\s.{0,1000}\.dit/ nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /esentutl\.exe\s\/y\s\/vss\s.{0,1000}\:\\windows\\ntds\\ntds\.dit/ nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
